calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-19-2016 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-06-2016 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Oct-04-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-26-2016 Continued To Jul-20-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-23-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Bryan Vereschagin of Vereschagin Law Frim, P.C. telephone number 415-834-5434 for Plaintiff Alexander Turkelev.
Hassan Aburish of Lewis, Brisbois, Bisgaard & Smith LLP telephone number 415-262-8571 for Defendant Jeffrey Lee.
Michelle Mello of Norton Rose Fulbright US LLP telephone number 213-892-9200 appeared by telephone for Defendant Farmers New World Life Insurance Company.

The matter was argued. Upon conclusion of argument, the Court confirmed its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT JEFFREY LEE'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT is overruled as to the first, second, third and seventh causes of action and sustained without leave to amend as to the sixth and eighth causes of action. The false promise, concealment, and misrepresentation claims are adequately pled. The conversion claim is not cognizable on these facts. Plaintiff Alexander Turkelev acknowledges that his breach of fiduciary claim is also not cognizable on these facts. Order signed in open Court.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)
